0.3.description:
Cookie Clicker now includes logic that prevents "unlock building" checks from occurring within the building itself.
The game still isn't balanced and requires at least one other game in the multiworld setup, so you can unstick Cookie Clicker using cookie multipliers sent from other games.
0.3.title: Cookie Clicker Archipelago 0.3

0.6.description:
The version [on main](https://github.com/Simik1997/AP_CookieClicker) was actually kinda working, it was just never packaged into a release, so I did just that.
I also took this opportunity to fix some major issues
## Changes
- Make goal to be checked on Achievement count for real
  - Fixes a crash when the goal option was set above 19 (check was done on building unlocked, so max 19)
- Rework item IDs to prevent collisions 
  - Fixes a bug were two or more items had the same ids, thus unlocking both at once/displaying incoherent info in trackers
- Skipped versions up to 0.6.0 so `worldversion` and release tag are in sync 
## Notes
Please keep in mind this release is just a hotfix !! Ideally we will keep the source repo as the main source for everything <3
In upcoming commits, I will probably focus on some less urgent issues, adding more items, and some cosmetic/QoL changes
0.6.title: Version 0.6.0 - It works :D

0.7.description:
As the [main repo](https://github.com/Simik1997/AP_CookieClicker) has up to date code, but no release for it, I'll keep publishing releases here :)

This new version introduces LOTS of new QoL features ! In short, new balance options for yaml, and menu rewamp for client. Read more below !

## New Yaml options
- CpS multiplicator (x10 / x100 / x1000 / etc)
- Lump harvest multiplicator 
- Autohint (when enabled, this option will automatically reveal items in adjacent achievements when you complete one)

## New features
- Received hints will now be visible in your achievement list, and the tooltip will display both item and unlock condition
- Hint dialog now has autocomplete ! No more guessing item names :)

## Changes
- AP menu (connection, hint) us now in a collapsible sidebar
- Connection form now handle errors properly

## Notes
As I dive into new features, I may take liberties to fit my taste. Feedback is welcomed :) 
I still don't know what I'll do next, check the Discord to follow discussion and make suggestions !
0.7.title: Version 0.7.0 - Feature Festival

0.7.1.description:
Bugfix: custom buffs were no reapplied after ascending.

0.7.1 client is compatible with 0.7.0 apworld.

WARNING : contains a breaking bug fixed in 0.7.2

0.7.2.description:
Bugfix : ascension was KO in 0.7.1 due to a missing parameter

0.7.2 client is compatible with 0.7.0 apworld

0.8.0.description:
This release mainly focuses on making the game more balanced and suitable for multiplayer gameplay, mainly by introducing Progressive items and Sphere soft logic.

:information_source: This apworld requires Archipelago client **v0.6.7 or higher**

## New yaml option
- Add an option to turn Synergy tier upgrades into Progressive 
  - When enabled, you will now have 3 unlock items for each building. Once unlocked, subsequent progressive items will reward you with the corresponding Synergy items (tier I & II)

## New features
- Introduce Sphere soft logic
  - This should avoid important early items being locked behind very late achievements.
  - Due to the nature of this feature, it may be hard to notice and/or not work as expected. Please share your thoughts with us :) 
- Add a settings section in the client
  - Mostly include settings to unbloat the notification section
  - Check them out they are really cool !
- Add a button to reset your AP/CC save

## Changes
- Heavenly upgrades are now progressive items
- Filler items received while offline are now applied on load (may be fixed in the future, but would need a lot of code changes)
- Upgrades that are in the Archipelago item pool should no longer be displayed in the store
- Unlocked buildings are now visible, even if you didn't reach the CpS threshold yet
- Building traps now delete buildings you own
- A few code design changes. Main changes:
  - Rework how locations (achievements) are stored. List is now generated from a [csv](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1HYuVLp_hS5lWVtr4BB9W804vrGcqpTBCUhjOf4bIq9g/edit) (also include details on spheres)
  - Migrate to the new logic system introduced in AP 0.6.7
- Graphical improvements

## Notes
This version is **not** retro-compatible with earlier releases (including alpha/beta releases)

<details><summary>Wanna know what's to come ?</summary>
Next big update should be a new set of checks, many many checks !! Let Cookie Clicker be feared among Archipelago players !!!!

![World burning](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExaDVseWs5aHk4NWFta2UxOGxoMHNrMGZuNnIzZmQ3OGM5dHQ1OTV0cCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/Lopx9eUi34rbq/giphy.gif)

</details>
0.8.0.title: Version 0.8.0 - The balance update (hopefully)

0.8.0-alpha.description:
:warning: This release is an **ALPHA**. This means features might be buggy and unbalanced. Use at your own risk !
(edit : there are multiple big bugs in this release that are very visible, but it's still usable)

## Features
- Add an option to turn Synergy tier upgrades into Progressive building
  - When enabled, you will now have **3 unlock items** for each building. Once unlocked, subsequent progressive items will reward you with the corresponding Synergy items (tier I & II)

## Changes
- Filler items received while offline are now applied on load (may be fixed in the future, but would need a lot of code changes)
- Upgrades that are in the Archipelago item pool should no longer be displayed in the store
- Unlocked buildings are now visible, even if you didn't reach the CpS threshold yet

## Notes
Yaml below enables everything rather than having default options. Please change the values or use the AP option creator if you don't like that

The 0.8.0 alpha client/apworld are **NOT** compatible with earlier releases
0.8.0-alpha.title: [ALPHA] 0.8.0 - Progressive buildings

0.8.0-alpha-2.description:
:warning: This version is STILL an alpha. You are discouraged to use in a public game.
Although there are some new features, this release is intended as a **hotfix** for the previous alpha, to make it more stable. It is very much unfinished though. Once again, this is a dev preview !

## Features
- New settings panel for client
  - Notification filter settings

## Changes
- Replace cookie x0.5 by cookies x10
- Add Progressive cursors
- Add build.sh and instructions

##
BUG FIXES
### From alpha :
- placed items count was incorrect (could mess up world gen)
- batch autohint would not skip completed achv
- Shop lock was broken (during play AND at launch)

### From main :
- Hinted location would display big numbers instead of Trillion/Quadrillion/etc
- Reincarnate would apply items and buffs twice
  - If One mind was unlocked, the item popup would prevent Reincarnation to be completed
- Typo in location name (not the only one but you know)
- Cookie mult would not update cookies baked
- Building trap now delete buildings you own
0.8.0-alpha-2.title: [ALPHA v2] 0.8.0a2 - Settings panel & bugfixes

0.8.0-alpha-3.description:
:warning: This is an ALPHA RELEASE, and this one was very much not tested. Do not use this in a public game.

The purpose of this release is specifically to playtest the tentative sphere implementation. I do not recommend using it at all, even in private games. While the client should remain compatible with earlier alpha, I give you no guaranties on that !

## Changes
- Rework how locations (achievements) are stores and 
  - List is now generated from a [csv](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1HYuVLp_hS5lWVtr4BB9W804vrGcqpTBCUhjOf4bIq9g/edit)
- Spheres ! Check the above csv for more details
0.8.0-alpha-3.title: [ALPHA] 0.8.0a3 - Spheres ? In my Cookie Clicker ?!

0.8.0-beta.description:
:warning: This is a beta version. While rather stable, some bugs may remains. I would not advise using it in a public game.
This version is NOT retrocompatible with prior 0.7.x or alpha versions

:information_source: This apworld **requires** archipelago client v0.6.7 or higher to work !

Basically ready for release but I'd like one or to players to test it in case I missed a bug :)
Really succinct changelog:
- Spheres/balancing
- Client settings
-  Progressive buildings (+ heavenly upgrades)
0.8.0-beta.title: [BETA] 0.8.0 - Do beta versions need titles

0.8.1.description:
Fixes a rare world generation issue.
See [0.8.0](https://github.com/Charlignon/AP_CookieClicker/releases/0.8.0/) for changelog.
Both versions are compatible.
